changelogHtml:
Version 1.5.0-alpha04

August 7, 2024

androidx.credentials:credentials:1.5.0-alpha04 and androidx.credentials:credentials-play-services-auth:1.5.0-alpha04 are released. Version 1.5.0-alpha04 contains these commits.

API Changes

  • Added a default value for isCloudBackupEnabled parameter of CreateRestoreCredentialRequest.

Bug Fixes

  • Removed minSdkVersion for credentials-play-services-auth.
